name: Isracard Ltd.
summary: Isracard Ltd. operates as a credit card company in Israel. Its products include Anyway App, Anypay, Topcash, Touch-Pay, Garmin Pay, and Isracard application. The company offers loans and credit plans, as well as issues debit cards. It also provides discounting and clearing services for the debit card brands, such as Isracard, MasterCard, American Express, and Visa. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel. Isracard Ltd.(TASE:ISCD) operates independently of Bank Hapoalim B.M. as of March 9, 2020.
